# Auto-Generated Samples

This directory contains sample applications generated by the
[DL Streamer Coding Agent](../../docs/user-guide/dev_guide/coding_agent.md) —
an AI-powered assistant that builds complete, ready-to-run DL Streamer projects
from natural language descriptions.

For installation and usage instructions, see the
[Coding Agent guide](../../docs/user-guide/dev_guide/coding_agent.md).
Example prompts are available in the
[Coding Agent examples](../../.github/skills/dlstreamer-coding-agent/examples) directory.

## Samples

| Sample | Prompt | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| [deepstream_python_conversion](deepstream_python_conversion/) | Analyze the DeepStream sample application at [deepstream-test4](https://github.com/NVIDIA-AI-IOT/deepstream_python_apps/tree/master/apps/deepstream-test4). Create an equivalent sample application for DL Streamer. | DL Streamer equivalent of NVIDIA's deepstream-test4 — detects objects with YOLO11n, overlays bounding boxes, and publishes detection metadata to file/Kafka/MQTT. |
| [deepstream_cpp_conversion](deepstream_cpp_conversion/) | Analyze the DeepStream sample application at [deepstream_lpr_app](https://github.com/NVIDIA-AI-IOT/deepstream_tao_apps/tree/master/apps/tao_others/deepstream_lpr_app). Create an equivalent sample application for DL Streamer. | C++ conversion of NVIDIA's DeepStream LPR app — detects license plates with YOLOv11, tracks them, and recognizes plate text with PaddleOCR. Outputs annotated video and JSONL metadata. |
| [license_plate_recognition](license_plate_recognition/) | Develop a Python application that implements license plate recognition pipeline: read input video from a file but also allow remote IP cameras, run YOLOv11 for object detection and PaddleOCR for character recognition, output license plate text as JSON, annotate video stream and store as output video file. | Detects license plates with YOLOv11 and recognizes plate text with PaddleOCR. Outputs JSON Lines results and annotated video. |
| [multi_stream_compose](multi_stream_compose/) | Create an application that analyzes video streams from multiple RTSP camera sources. For each stream run AI analytics to detect objects and overlay annotations. Allow a user to dynamically start/stop recording of a selected annotated input stream to a local disk. Merge output from multiple streams and send combined output to a remote display over WebRTC. | Processes 4 video streams with shared YOLO11s detection, composites into a 2×2 GPU-accelerated mosaic streamed via WebRTC, with on-demand per-stream recording. |
| [people_detection_tracking](people_detection_tracking/) | Create a bash script that detects and tracks (use deep sort algorithm) people on video stream, using YOLO26m for detection and Mars-Small-128 for re-identification. Annotate video stream and store as output video file. | Detects and tracks people using YOLO26m + Deep SORT with Mars-Small-128 re-ID model. Outputs annotated video with tracking IDs and JSON metadata. |
| [pose_estimation_compose](pose_estimation_compose/) | Create a bash script that analyzes four video streams with pose estimation using YOLO26n, YOLO11n, YOLOv8n, YOLOv8l models. Annotate each stream with keypoints and model name text. Merge output from multiple streams into a combined output file. | Runs 4 YOLO pose models in parallel on the same video, annotates each with keypoints and model name, and composites into a 2×2 mosaic. |
| [safety_compliance](safety_compliance/) | Create an application to monitor safety compliance at a construction site: detect workers with YOLO, track across frames, crop worker regions and send to a VLM to verify helmet/harness compliance, generate alerts for violations. | Monitors construction site safety — detects workers with YOLO26m, tracks them, uses Qwen2.5-VL to verify helmet and harness compliance, and generates alerts for violations. |
| [smart_nvr](smart_nvr/) | Develop a vision AI application that implements an event-based smart video recording pipeline: read input from RTSP camera or file, detect people, trigger recording when person is detected and stop when out of view, output sequentially numbered files. | Event-based smart recording — detects people with YOLO11n and records video only when a person is present, producing sequentially numbered MP4 files. |

Each sample directory contains its own README with detailed setup instructions,
model export scripts, and usage examples.
